channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [UNIPARTS] Uniparts India Ltd Announces Trading Window Closure for FY2026
item.description:
Uniparts India Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for Equity Shares. The closure will commence from April 01, 2026, and will end 48 hours after the declaration of the Audited Financial results for the quarter and financial year ending March 31, 2026. The decision is in accordance with the Company’s Code of Conduct to Regulate, Monitor and Report Trading by Designated Persons and immediate relative of Designated Persons adopted under the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. The Designated Persons and immediate relatives of Designated Persons, including insiders, have been informed not to deal in Equity Shares of the Company during this period.

  • Uniparts India Ltd announces trading window closure for FY2026
  • Closure to commence from April 01, 2026
  • Ends 48 hours after the declaration of Audited Financial results for Q4 and FY2026
  • Decision in accordance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015
  • Designated Persons and immediate relatives advised not to deal in Equity Shares during this period

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Uniparts India Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [ASHOKALC] Aeonx Digital Technology Ltd Closes Trading Window for Designated Persons
item.description:
Pursuant to SEBI regulations and the Company's Code of Conduct, Aeonx Digital Technology Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for all designated persons. The closure will be effective from 1st April, 2026 until the end of 48 hours after the declaration of the Audited Financial Results (Consolidated and Standalone) for the quarter and year ending on 31st March, 2026. The date of the Board Meeting for the consideration of the aforesaid Audited Financial Results will be intimated in due course.

  • Trading window closure for designated persons of Aeonx Digital Technology Ltd
  • Closure effective from 1st April, 2026
  • Closure to last until 48 hours after the declaration of Audited Financial Results for Q1 and FY 2026
  • Board Meeting date for consideration of Audited Financial Results to be announced later
  • Movement in line with SEBI regulations and the Company's Code of Conduct

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ASHOK ALCO-CHEM LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SUDAI] Sudal Industries Ltd Appoints New Secretarial Auditor for FY 2025-2026
item.description:
Sudal Industries Ltd, a Nashik-based manufacturer of aluminum extrusions and components, announced the appointment of M/s. KRS AND CO. Company Secretaries as the Secretarial Auditors for the Financial Year 2025-2026. The decision was made during a Board Meeting held on March 30, 2026. The auditor is a peer-reviewed proprietorship firm established by CS Ketan Ravindra Shirwadkar in 2017, having over 10 years of experience in company law, SEBI and FEMA regulations. The firm has expertise in various areas including corporate laws, IPO, FPO, listing, listing compliances, secretarial management guidance & audit, due diligence, compliance audit, corporate governance audit, merger acquisition, and corporate restructuring.

  • Appointment of M/s. KRS AND CO. Company Secretaries as Secretarial Auditors for FY 2025-2026
  • M/s. KRS AND CO. is a peer-reviewed proprietorship firm established in 2017 by CS Ketan Ravindra Shirwadkar
  • CS Ketan Ravindra Shirwadkar has over 10 years of experience in company law, SEBI and FEMA regulations
  • The firm has expertise in various areas including corporate laws, IPO, FPO, listing, listing compliances, secretarial management guidance & audit, due diligence, compliance audit, corporate governance audit, merger acquisition, and corporate restructuring

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SUDAL INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SYNTHFO] Belding India Ltd Announces Closure of Trading Window till April 3, 2026
item.description:
Belding India Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, and the Company’s Code of Conduct. The trading window will remain closed from April 1, 2026, till 48 hours after the declaration of Financial Results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. This is a routine measure taken by the company to regulate, monitor, and report trading by designated persons and their immediate relatives.

  • Belding India Ltd announces closure of trading window
  • Trading window to remain closed from April 1, 2026, till 48 hours after the declaration of Financial Results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026
  • Measure taken in accordance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015
  • Part of the Company’s Code of Conduct to Regulate, Monitor and Report Trading by Designated Persons and their immediate relatives

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SYNTHIKO FOILS LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [SATIN] Satin Creditcare Network Ltd Allots 2,500 Non-convertible Debentures Worth INR 25,00,00,000
item.description:
Satin Creditcare Network Ltd has allotted 2,500 subordinated, unsecured, rated, listed, taxable, redeemable, transferable, non-convertible debentures having a face value of INR 100,000 each and an aggregate nominal value of INR 25,00,00,000. The debentures have been issued based on the terms and conditions set out in the general information document dated August 14, 2025, the key information document dated March 24, 2026, the private placement offer and application letter dated March 24, 2026, and the debenture trust deed dated March 25, 2026 executed between the Company and Catalyst Trusteeship Limited. This decision was made in a meeting of the Working Committee of the Board of Directors held on March 30, 2026.

  • Satin Creditcare Network Ltd has allotted 2,500 non-convertible debentures.
  • The debentures have a face value of INR 100,000 each and an aggregate nominal value of INR 25,00,00,000.
  • The debentures have been issued based on the terms and conditions set out in various documents dated between August 14, 2025, and March 25, 2026.
  • The decision was made in a meeting of the Working Committee of the Board of Directors held on March 30, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Satin Creditcare Network Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [EMCURE] Emcure Pharmaceuticals Ltd Closes Trading Window for Insider Trading
item.description:
Emcure Pharmaceuticals Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for insider trading. The closure will be effective from Wednesday, April 01, 2026, and will remain in force until 48 hours after the declaration of the audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ending on March 31, 2026. The date of the Board Meeting for the approval of the audited financial results has not been announced yet. This decision is in accordance with the Code of Conduct for regulating, monitoring, and reporting of insider trading in the securities of the Company, as per the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015.

  • Emcure Pharmaceuticals Ltd closes trading window for insider trading
  • Closure effective from April 01, 2026
  • Will remain closed until 48 hours after the declaration of audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ending on March 31, 2026
  • Decision in accordance with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015
  • Date of Board Meeting for approval of audited financial results not announced

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Emcure Pharmaceuticals Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [HINDOILEXP] Hindustan Oil Exploration Company Ltd's CFO Resigns Due to Personal Reasons
item.description:
Hindustan Oil Exploration Company Ltd announced the resignation of its Chief Financial Officer (CFO), Mr. N Sivalai Senthilnathan, due to personal reasons, effective March 28, 2026. The company made this announcement in compliance with the SEBI Listing Regulations. The resigning CFO does not hold any directorships in other listed entities and there are no relationships between directors to disclose.

  • Hindustan Oil Exploration Company Ltd's CFO, Mr. N Sivalai Senthilnathan, has resigned due to personal reasons.
  • The resignation is effective from March 28, 2026.
  • The company made the announcement in compliance with the SEBI Listing Regulations.
  • The resigning CFO does not hold any directorships in other listed entities.
  • There are no relationships between directors to disclose.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HINDUSTAN OIL EXPLORATION CO.LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [SUDTIND-B] Suditi Industries Approves Allotment of Equity Shares & Warrants on Preferential Basis
item.description:
Suditi Industries Ltd. has approved the allotment of 8,22,733 Equity Shares and 25,04,667 Warrants on a preferential basis. The Equity Shares are priced at Rs. 59.12 each, amounting to Rs. 4,86,39,974.96, and have been allotted to various non-promoter entities. The Warrants are priced at Rs. 59.12 each, amounting to Rs. 14,80,75,913, and have been allotted to 10 non-promoter entities. The Warrants can be converted into equity shares within 18 months from the date of allotment upon payment of the balance consideration of Rs. 44.34 per warrant. The allotment of equity shares and warrants is in compliance with the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 and the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Issue of Capital and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2018.

  • Suditi Industries approves allotment of 8,22,733 Equity Shares on preferential basis
  • Equity Shares priced at Rs. 59.12 each, amounting to Rs. 4,86,39,974.96
  • Allotment of 25,04,667 Warrants on preferential basis
  • Warrants priced at Rs. 59.12 each, amounting to Rs. 14,80,75,913
  • Warrants can be converted into equity shares within 18 months from the date of allotment

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SUDITI INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Investment

item.title: [JSTL] Jeevan Scientific Technology Executive Director Transfers 100,000 Equity Shares
item.description:
Nageswar Rao Yarlagadda, Executive Director of Jeevan Scientific Technology Limited, has transferred 100,000 equity shares of the company by way of off-market transaction on 27.03.2026. This disclosure was made under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The transaction details are provided in the disclosure, including the pre and post-transaction holdings of Mr. Yarlagadda.

  • Nageswar Rao Yarlagadda, Executive Director of Jeevan Scientific Technology Limited, transferred 100,000 equity shares
  • The transaction was conducted off-market on 27.03.2026
  • The transaction details are disclosed under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011
  • The disclosure includes pre and post-transaction holdings of Mr. Yarlagadda

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Jeevan Scientific Technology Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [BFINVEST] BF Investment Ltd: Inter-se Transfer of Shares by Promoter Group Members KSL Holdings Private Limited to Ajinkya Investment & Trading Company and Sundaram Trading & Investment Private Limited
item.description:
BF Investment Ltd has disclosed an inter-se transfer of shares from KSL Holdings Private Limited to Ajinkya Investment & Trading Company and Sundaram Trading & Investment Private Limited, all members of the company's Promoter Group. The transfer involved 50,54,091 shares, representing 13.42% of the Equity Share Capital of the Target Company on March 24, 2026. The transaction did not affect the aggregate shareholding of Promoter and Promoter group before and after the transfer. The required fees have been remitted through the SEBI online portal on March 27, 2026.

  • Inter-se transfer of shares from KSL Holdings Private Limited to Ajinkya Investment & Trading Company and Sundaram Trading & Investment Private Limited
  • Transfer of 50,54,091 shares representing 13.42% of the Equity Share Capital of the Target Company
  • Transaction did not affect the aggregate shareholding of Promoter and Promoter group before and after the transfer
  • Required fees remitted through the SEBI online portal on March 27, 2026
  • Regulation 10(5), 10(6), and 10(7) intimation and report filed with BSE and NSE

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BF INVESTMENT LTD. | Category: Acquisitions
